Class SecurityActionApplication

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafioschtrader.entities.SecurityActionApplication
@Entity public class SecurityActionApplication extends BaseID<Integer>
Records a tenant's application (or reversal) of a SecurityAction ISIN change. Each tenant can apply a given SecurityAction at most once; this entity tracks the resulting sell/buy transactions.
